text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Today's the day. The Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm here because of the support of everyone at
the Hanshin and Kyoto Racecourses.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
choice_data_list: Show everyone what you're made of!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I will! Everyone's waited for me, so I'll run my
heart out in return.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I may be useless... I may cause everyone trouble...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I can run... So I'll do just that, all the way up
to the finish line!
